parameters.query: SELECT a.fecha::text AS "Fecha", a.hora::text AS "Hora", a.nombre AS "Nombre", a.servicio AS "Servicio", a.numero AS "Número", a.estado AS "Estado", b.whatsapp_instance, b.owner_number, b.name AS business_name FROM appointments a JOIN businesses b ON b.id = a.business_id WHERE a.fecha = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date AND a.estado = 'Pendiente' AND b.active = TRUE AND a.hora BETWEEN ((NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota') + INTERVAL '1 hour 55 minutes')::time AND ((NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota') + INTERVAL '2 hours 5 minutes')::time

staticData.documentation: Workflow NUEVO — recordatorio 2 horas antes de la cita. Corre cada 10 min, busca citas de HOY en la ventana [ahora+1h55m, ahora+2h05m). IMPORTANTE: importar en n8n y ACTIVAR manualmente (queda 'active: false' por seguridad, para revisar antes de que empiece a enviar mensajes reales). Requiere las mismas env vars que 'Recordatorios 24h': EVOLUTION_API_URL, EVOLUTION_API_KEY.
